message:
feat: enforce fail-closed delegate state checks and introduce hard escrow denial

Add ensure_running_for() guard to dispatch_hostcall() and
request_declassification() so non-Running delegates reject operations
with a new DelegateCellError::InactiveState error instead of silently
proceeding. This enforces fail-closed semantics for delegate cells
outside the Running state.

Introduce DenialReason::CapabilityEscrowDenied variant distinct from
CapabilityEscrowPending, used when the escrow system hard-denies a
capability request (e.g., flood detection). Update guardplane penalty
match arm to handle both variants.

Fix forced-termination timing to use grace_period_ns in the
forced_completion_timestamp calculation rather than just +1ns,
ensuring proper grace period accounting. Tighten lifetime expiry
test assertions to verify Terminated|Quarantined state (not
Terminating) and confirm no pending cancel token.

Add 4 new tests: escrow_flood_denial_reports_hard_denial_to_callers,
non_running_delegate_cannot_dispatch_hostcalls,
non_running_delegate_cannot_request_declassification, and
CapabilityEscrowDenied serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
